name: Review System
description: Review submission flow for marketplace transactions. Allows buyers to rate, write text reviews, and upload photos after a completed booking.

page_briefs.write-review: Guided review submission form anchored to a specific booking. Top section shows a compact booking summary card with listing thumbnail and dates. Form sections include star rating selectors for overall and category scores, a text area for the written review, a photo upload dropzone, and a submit button with preview toggle.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
